comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Updated to add a c/image bump.

@TomSweeneyRedHat Do we want a Skopeo release to go along with Podman 4.9? The Skopeo `main` branch has been getting updated with the latest dependencies…
@mtrmac I think I answered your question elsewhere.  Yep, we wanted a Skopeo and a Buildah bump to go along with Podman v4.9 into RHEL 8.10/9.4.
(Manually extended with a bump of c/image to `main`, to update for the c/storage API break)
